name: Bosselman Travel Center - Rapid City
description: Full-service travel center at I-90 Exit 55 (Deadwood Ave) with 8 diesel lanes, about 75 truck parking spaces, 8 showers, Marlins Restaurant, an on-site Boss Truck Shop and a CAT Scale.

name: Crow's I-90 Travel Plaza (Flying J)
description: Flying J licensed travel plaza at I-90 Exit 61 with 8 diesel lanes, about 125 truck parking spaces, 8 showers, laundry, DEF and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: Common Cents Travel Plaza 125 - Rapid City
description: AMBEST travel plaza at I-90 Exit 61 (Elk Vale Rd) with 6 fuel lanes, 24-hour diesel, deli, 3 showers, Wi-Fi and DEF; limited dedicated big-rig overnight parking.

name: Love's Travel Stop #602
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-90 Exit 67B near Ellsworth AFB with diesel, showers, a restaurant, Wi-Fi and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: BJ's Country Store
description: Conoco-branded country store and fuel stop at I-90 Exit 30 with 24-hour diesel, a deli, convenience store, casino and adjacent motel.

name: Common Cents - Sturgis
description: Convenience and fuel stop near I-90 Exit 32 in Sturgis with 24-hour diesel, a deli, laundromat and on-site repair/tire service.

name: Conoco - Wall
description: Conoco fuel stop at I-90 Exit 110 in Wall (Badlands/Wall Drug area) offering diesel and a convenience store.

name: Discount Fuel (Sinclair) - Kadoka
description: Independent Sinclair-branded 24-hour truck stop just off I-90 Exit 150 in Kadoka with self-serve diesel, a convenience store, deli and truck parking.

name: CAT Scale at Bosselman Rapid City
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Bosselman Travel Center at I-90 Exit 55 in Rapid City.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Rapid City
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J / Crow's I-90 travel plaza at I-90 Exit 61 in Rapid City.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Box Elder
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #602 at I-90 Exit 67B in Box Elder.

name: Tilford Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: SDDOT/SD Highway Patrol port of entry and weigh station on eastbound I-90 at mile marker 39 near Tilford (between Sturgis and Rapid City) with electronic pre-screening and indoor inspection.

name: Spearfish Welcome Center / Rest Area
description: SDDOT eastbound-only welcome center/rest area at I-90 mile marker 1 (about a mile east of the Wyoming line near Beulah) with truck and car parking, restrooms, water and a picnic area.

name: Wasta Rest Area
description: SDDOT rest area on both directions of I-90 near mile marker 99 at Wasta (between Rapid City and Wall) with truck and car parking, restrooms, water and a picnic area.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Rapid City
description: Commercial/OTR and semi truck tire dealer and service in Rapid City near I-90, carrying Bridgestone, Goodyear and Firestone commercial lines.

name: Boss Truck Shop - Spearfish
description: 24/7 mobile truck, trailer, reefer and tire repair/service at I-90 Exit 14 in Spearfish for all makes and models.

name: D&D Truck Wash
description: Truck and trailer wash serving the Rapid City I-90 area.

name: LJ's Recovery & Transport
description: Heavy-duty semi truck towing and recovery covering the I-90 corridor from Rapid City north to Spearfish and south on Hwy 79.

name: M & W Towing & Recovery
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing, recovery and roadside assistance in the Rapid City/Box Elder I-90 area, servicing within a 300-mile radius.

name: Freedom Field Repair
description: 24/7 mobile truck, trailer and tire repair covering about a 200-mile radius of Rapid City along the I-90 corridor.

name: Quality Inn Spearfish I-90
description: Hotel near I-90 Exit 14 in Spearfish with a parking area that accommodates large/oversized vehicles including trucks and trailers per guest reviews.
